purpose: Phase 17 Campaign Calendar / Launch Room Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This defines public campaign plans that connect books, share kits, feeds, downloads, trust pages, evidence pages, and reader paths into weekly launch pushes.
rules: Campaigns must route back to trust and evidence pages.
Campaign copy should use share kits instead of unsupported claims.
Every campaign needs a primary route, share route, download route, feed route, trust route, evidence route, and reader path.
Campaign calendars are public planning assets, not promises of live posting or background automation.
Campaign plans should be reusable as weekly launch rooms.
No campaign file may contain private or non-public user data.

campaigns.title: Black File Launch Campaign
campaigns.label: Week 1 launch room
campaigns.summary: A starter campaign that routes readers through the Black File, trust rules, evidence vault, share kit, feed, download pack, and reader paths.
dailyPushes: Day 1: introduce the Black File and the evidence-boundary rule.
Day 2: share the Starter Pack and route readers to trust-center.html.
Day 3: post a short hook from the Black File Starter Share Kit.
Day 4: route readers to the Evidence Vault and Schema Index.
Day 5: push the reader path and book universe.
Day 6: recap the strongest archive doors.
Day 7: invite readers to follow the Feed Center and Signal Board.

campaigns.title: Intelligence Dossiers Campaign
campaigns.label: Agency archive push
campaigns.summary: A campaign for CIA, NSA, declassified archives, surveillance, MKUltra, intelligence maps, and agency dossier reader paths.
dailyPushes: Day 1: open with declassified archives and source-methodology boundaries.
Day 2: route readers to the intelligence network map.
Day 3: share the MKUltra / deep-state answer pages with caution labels.
Day 4: push CIA and NSA book pages.
Day 5: release the intelligence dossier pack.
Day 6: post a short video caption from the share kit.
Day 7: recap the agency archive and reader path.

campaigns.title: Crime-State Overlap Campaign
campaigns.label: Crime network push
campaigns.summary: A campaign for cartels, mafia logistics, sanctions, court records, laundering, corruption, and crime-state maps.
dailyPushes: Day 1: introduce logistics and finance as the hidden architecture of crime.
Day 2: explain court records versus sanctions.
Day 3: route readers to the crime-state map.
Day 4: push cartel, Albanian mafia, and Ndrangheta book doors.
Day 5: release the crime-state overlap pack.
Day 6: post a thread from the crime-state share kit.
Day 7: recap evidence lanes and reader path.

campaigns.title: War Machine Campaign
campaigns.label: War and contractor push
campaigns.summary: A campaign for war contractors, procurement, human-cost source lanes, conflict routes, and public-record war machine mapping.
dailyPushes: Day 1: open with the machine: budgets, contracts, agencies, bodies.
Day 2: route readers to human-cost sources.
Day 3: push Blackwater and WWIII book pages.
Day 4: share the War Machine Pack.
Day 5: post a video caption from the share kit.
Day 6: route to the feed center and update monitor.
Day 7: recap the contractor reader path.

campaigns.title: Symbolic Power Campaign
campaigns.label: D.O.G / esoteric push
campaigns.summary: A campaign for symbols, D.O.G, Masonic architecture, esoteric commentary, and evidence-bound interpretation.
dailyPushes: Day 1: explain that symbols are language, not automatic proof.
Day 2: route readers to D.O.G and symbolic power authority pages.
Day 3: push the Symbolic Power Pack.
Day 4: share Masonic architecture and symbol book doors.
Day 5: post a short hook from the share kit.
Day 6: route readers to trust claim labels.
Day 7: recap the D.O.G reader path.

campaigns.title: Trust And Evidence Campaign
campaigns.label: Credibility push
campaigns.summary: A campaign for source hierarchy, claim labels, corrections, association boundaries, evidence vault, schema index, and trust-center routes.
dailyPushes: Day 1: explain why trust matters in dark research.
Day 2: publish the source hierarchy route.
Day 3: push claim labels and corrections policy.
Day 4: route readers to the Evidence Vault index.
Day 5: share the Trust And Evidence Pack.
Day 6: post the evidence-boundary video caption.
Day 7: recap schema, feeds, and reader path.
